name: opensilver
description: OpenSilver monorepo scaffold for SilverScript covenant patterns and tooling.

scripts.build: tsc -b sdk cli mcp wizard integrations
scripts.clean: rm -rf sdk/dist cli/dist mcp/dist wizard/dist integrations/dist coverage docs/site/.docusaurus
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b sdk cli mcp wizard integrations
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test
